clean.help: Clean and format the project code.
clean.option.check: Exit with error if changes are needed
clean.not_clean: Code is not clean; run `autoship clean`.
commit.help: Generate a commit message and commit staged/unstaged changes.
commit.editor_error: Editor exited with code {code}; commit message was not saved.
commit.editor_unknown: Editor '{editor}' is not in the allowlist. Allowed editors: {allowed}
init.help: Initialize an AutoShip configuration file for the current project.
plugin.list_help: List registered plugins and their trust levels.
plugin.search_help: Search the official plugin registry index.
plugin.install_help: Install a plugin package and register it locally.
plugin.uninstall_help: Uninstall a plugin package and remove it from the local registry.
plugin.trust_help: Update the trust level of a registered plugin.
plugin.update_help: Check for and install plugin updates.
plugin.header.name: Name
plugin.install_trust_warning_community: Warning: {plugin_name} is a community plugin and has not been verified by the AutoShip team.
plugin.install_trust_warning_untrusted: Warning: {plugin_name} is marked as untrusted. Only install if you fully understand the source.
plugin.install_unverified_signature: Warning: {plugin_name} is listed as verified but has no checksum or signature in the registry.
plugin.install_trust_confirm: Do you want to continue with the installation?
plugin.no_sandbox_untrusted_blocked: Refusing to install untrusted plugin {plugin_name} without sandbox. The --no-sandbox flag cannot be used with untrusted plugins.
plugin.no_sandbox_community_warning: DANGER: You are about to install community plugin {plugin_name} WITHOUT sandbox isolation. This grants the plugin full access to your environment, filesystem, and network during installation.
plugin.no_sandbox_confirm: Type the plugin name to confirm unsafe installation:
plugin.update_name_or_all: Please specify a plugin name or use --all.
plugin.info_help: Show detailed information about a plugin in the registry.
plugin.not_found_in_registry: Plugin '{name}' not found in the registry.
registry.empty: No plugins found in the registry.
registry.sync_help: Sync the plugin registry index from the remote source.
registry.sync_failed: Failed to sync registry index from remote source.
fix.help: Ask an LLM to propose a fix for the last verification failure.
fix.missing_api_key: LLM provider '{provider}' requires an API key. Set it in config or via AUTOSHIP_LLM__API_KEY.
fix.no_error_log: No error log found at {path}. Run `autoship verify` first or pass an error file.
fix.thinking: Asking the model for a fix...
fix.patch_no_tool: Neither git nor patch is available to apply the suggestion.
fix.patch_unsafe_paths: Patch contains unsafe file paths and will not be applied.
fix.dry_run: [dry-run] Would send the following context files to the model: {files}. No LLM call will be made.
doctor.option.fail_on_error: Exit with non-zero code when errors are present
doctor.title: AutoShip Environment Diagnostics
doctor.git_suggestion: Install Git and ensure it is on PATH.
doctor.clean_suggestion: Install missing tools or run `autoship clean` will skip them.
doctor.model_suggestion: Run `autoship init` or edit `.autoship.toml` to add a local model.
doctor.model_unreachable: Configured model backend is not reachable
doctor.model_start: Start your local model server (Ollama/LM Studio) and verify base_url.
doctor.plugin_suggestion: Install tools for the plugins you want to use; unrelated plugins will still work.
doctor.dirs_suggestion: Ensure HOME is set and writable.
doctor.dirs_writable_suggestion: Ensure the directories are writable by the current user.
metrics.title: Runtime metrics
upload.help: Upload artifacts to a configured target.
upload.option.tag: Docker image tag or GitHub release tag
verify.help: Run a verification command and capture errors for AI-assisted fixing.
verify.option.fix: Ask the model to suggest fixes on failure
verify.command_not_found: Verification command not found on PATH: {cmd}
verify.failed: Verification failed with exit code {code} for command: {command}
audit.export_help: Export audit logs to a JSON Lines file.
audit.cleanup_help: Remove audit log files older than the retention period.
audit.option.since: Export records after this time (ISO or 1d/7d/30d)
audit.cleanup_dry_run: [dry-run] Would remove old audit log files
config.list_help: Show effective configuration (sensitive values are redacted).
config.telemetry_help: Enable, disable, or view telemetry setting.
upload.repository_url_invalid: --repository-url must use HTTPS or point to localhost/127.0.0.1
upload.option.tag: Docker image tag or GitHub release tag
error.suggestion.init: Run `autoship init` to create a configuration file.
error.suggestion.model_config: Edit `.autoship.toml` to configure a model backend, or run `autoship init`.
error.suggestion.install_tool: Install the required tool or add it to PATH.
error.suggestion.doctor: Run `autoship doctor` to diagnose your environment.
